programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: A Couple Fulfills Their Dream of Moving to Cape Cod, MA Full-Time
programs.desc: A Massachusetts couple buys an outdated beach house and lives there while completely gutting and renovating it into a dream home; they aim to fulfill their dream of having a waterfront property and living year-round on Cape Cod.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: From Renters to Owners in Apalachee Bay, Florida
programs.desc: After selling their farm in South Carolina, a couple retreats to Florida's beaches; they are ready to stop renting and buy a fixer-upper by the water, where they can create their dream home.

programs.title: Design Down Under
programs.desc: Clients seek out Georgia and Richie to revamp their dated mountain home into a moody masterpiece; inspired by their clients' travels, Georgia and Richie incorporate color and functionality into their new home.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Young Family Seeks Cozy Beach Hideaway in Emerald Isle
programs.desc: A Virginia couple is excited to finally pursue their dreams of owning a beach home in Emerald Isle, North Carolina. With their sons growing up quickly, they hope to build unforgettable memories by renovating a property with both personality and potential.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programs.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programs.title: Design Down Under
programs.desc: Clients seek out Georgia and Richie to revamp their dated mountain home into a moody masterpiece; inspired by their clients' travels, Georgia and Richie incorporate color and functionality into their new home.
